blogs.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner

blogs.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
blogs.description: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
